channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: EPL: Arsenal prepare £70m bid for Newcastle captain Guimaraes — Report
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Arsenal are reportedly preparing a £70m bid for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes as they look to strengthen their midfield. Get the latest on Arsenal’s tr
Read More: https://punchng.com/epl-arsenal-prepare-70m-bid-for-newcastle-captain-guimaraes-report/

item.title: Obi urges INEC to extend voter registration ahead of 2027 polls
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Peter Obi calls on INEC to extend voter registration for the 2027 general elections, citing a court judgment and the need to include more eligible Nigerian
Read More: https://punchng.com/obi-urges-inec-to-extend-voter-registration-ahead-of-2027-polls/

item.title: Atiku undermining Nigeria by lobbying against Tinubu in US — Presidency
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Presidency accuses Atiku Abubakar of undermining Nigeria’s sovereignty by lobbying the US against President Tinubu over a 1993 case. Read more here.
Read More: https://punchng.com/atiku-undermining-nigeria-by-lobbying-against-tinubu-in-us-presidency/

item.title: FG, partners unveil platform for African-language AI
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria’s FG and partners launch ATLAS Umoja, a pan-African AI platform to support large language models for African languages and cultures. Discover its i
Read More: https://punchng.com/fg-partners-unveil-platform-for-african-language-ai/

item.title: F1 considering Malaysian GP return as 2026 replacement race
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Formula 1 bosses are in talks with organisers of the Malaysian Grand Prix to see the Sepang race make a surprise return to the calendar this year as a stand-in event.

item.title: No more hostilities, Akpabio apologises as Oshiomhole recalls ‘massaging woman’s legs’ jibe
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Senate President Godswill Akpabio apologises to Senator Adams Oshiomhole after breaching their truce with a joke about the ‘massaging woman’ video.
Read More: https://punchng.com/no-more-hostilities-akpabio-apologises-as-oshiomhole-recalls-massaging-womans-legs-jibe/

item.title: US House passes symbolic Iran war rebuke to Trump
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The US House of Representatives passed a symbolic resolution calling for President Trump to halt military action against Iran amidst escalating conflict.
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-house-passes-symbolic-iran-war-rebuke-to-trump/

item.title: Army declares soldier wanted for selling military uniforms to terrorists
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigerian Army declares Private Mohammed Yusuf Amutu wanted for allegedly selling military uniforms to terrorists. Public urged to provide information.
Read More: https://punchng.com/army-declares-soldier-wanted-for-selling-military-uniforms-to-terrorists/

item.title: VIDEO: Islamic prayer held for slain Lagos NURTW official
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Watch the Islamic prayer held for slain Lagos NURTW official Toba Ajiboye (Toba Ijaya) at his Fadeyi residence. Police are investigating his murder.
Read More: https://punchng.com/video-islamic-prayer-held-for-slain-lagos-nurtw-official/

item.title: Court jails three for life over Oyo school abduction
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Three suspects have been sentenced to life imprisonment by a Federal High Court in Abuja for their roles in the Oyo school abduction. Learn more about the
Read More: https://punchng.com/breaking-court-jails-three-for-life-over-oyo-school-abduction/

item.title: 'Kings of Manchester' - Anderson sends Man Utd message after City move sealed
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Elliot Anderson has declared Manchester City the "kings of Manchester" after completing his £116m move from Nottingham Forest.

item.title: Shettima leads six governors on working visit to Benin Republic
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Vice President Kashim Shettima leads six governors on a working visit to Benin Republic to study the Glo-Djigbé Industrial Zone for Nigeria’s textile indus
Read More: https://punchng.com/shettima-leads-six-governors-on-working-visit-to-benin-republic/

item.title: Hamilton sends message to title rivals
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton says he 'really believes' Ferrari can enable him to fight for an eighth world championship title this season.

item.title: “Don’t Let Me Die” – Hospitalised Veteran Actress Ngozi Nwosu Begs For Help
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Ngozi Nwosu has appealed to Nigerians for financial support as she battles an undisclosed health condition. In a video on her Instagram page on Thursday, the actress disclosed that she had been admitted for three weeks, adding she was in a severe pain. “My people, fans and

item.title: Igbo community raises alarm over illegal taxation in Cross River
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Demands crackdown on non-state actors By Ike Uchechukwu, CALABAR The Igbo community in Cross River State has raised the alarm over alleged illegal taxation and daily harassment by non-state actors, warning that the situation is crippling businesses across the state. The concerns were raised during a

item.title: I am a 63-year-old semiretired physician. If I have saved $2 million for retirement, should Social Security be optional?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “At that point, they arguably no longer need the government’s retirement safety net.”

item.title: NERC’s Mini-grid Reforms Unlock 48 Interconnected Sites Across 19 States — REA
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Rural Electrification Agency (REA) has said that Nigeria’s new mini-grid framework by the Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC), has moved the country’s off-grid power sector from small-scale pilots to a more ambitious, utility-style market, with 48 interconnected mini-grid sites now

item.title: Senate Seeks Rehabilitation Of 74 Federal Roads, Increased FERMA Funding
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Senate on Thursday directed the immediate rehabilitation of 74 critical federal roads across the country. It also called for increased budgetary allocation to the Federal Roads Maintenance Agency (FERMA) to address the nation’s deteriorating road infrastructure. The resolution followed the

item.title: Nollywood veteran Ngozi Nwosu appeals for ₦30m over undisclosed ailment
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Ngozi Nwosu has appealed for public support after revealing that she has been hospitalised for three weeks and urgently requires ₦30 million to undergo three life-saving surgeries The post Nollywood veteran Ngozi Nwosu appeals for ₦30m over undisclosed ailment appeared firs

item.title: OFFICIAL: Garnacho Joins Aston Villa On Loan
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Argentina forward Alejandro Garnacho has joined Aston Villa on loan from Chelsea. Chelsea, in a statement, wrote:”Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho has completed a season-long loan move to Premier League club Aston Villa, with an obligation for the move to become permanent next summer should certain

item.title: ‘Don’t disenfranchise eligible Nigerians’ — Peter Obi tells INEC to extend voter registration
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, Peter Obi, has appealed to the Independent National Electoral Commission, INEC, to extend the ongoing Continuous Voter Registration, CVR, exercise to allow more eligible Nigerians, particularly young people, to register ahead of the 202

item.description: …Urges prosecution of killers of two Plateau farmers By Henry Umoru ABUJA — The Senate has called on the Federal Government to provide adequate funding for the Federal Roads Maintenance Agency (FERMA) to accelerate the rehabilitation of critical roads across the country. The upper chamber also

item.title: African Marketplace Dubai 2026 Returns in October: AMP 2026 Is Opening Real Doors for African and Caribbean Entrepreneurs
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: African Marketplace (AMP) is set to return for its second edition from October 10–12, 2026, at the Conrad Hotel Dubai, following the success of its 2025 debut. The three-day event will once again bring together some of the finest products, services, creatives, and innovators from Africa and the Cari

item.title: CSOs launch Nigeria’s forest, climate journalism fellowship
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The fellowship was unveiled on Thursday in Calabar, Cross River State, at the fourth Multi-Stakeholder Conference on Deforestation, an annual forum that brings together government institutions, civil society organisations, forest-dependent communities, researchers, journalists and development partne

item.title: 2027 Elections: Citizens To Upload Polling Unit Results As New Platform Targets Election Rigging
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A coalition of civil society organisations and election stakeholders, Thursday, launched an Independent Election Results Platform (IERP) designed to allow citizens to independently upload and verify polling unit results, in a move aimed at strengthening electoral transparency, curbing manipulation a

item.title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: In an earnings call yesterday, Tesla CEO Elon Musk did his best to paint a positive portrait of the company's robotaxi program. New cities are being added, more miles are being driven, and more people are experiencing Tesla's unsupervised vehicles. But Musk's typical bullishness seemed to be absent

item.title: How Sentinel X Is Transforming Farming — Martha Solomon
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Sentinel X is the latest agricultural technology from the United States to fight Fall Armyworm. It has been deployed in Kenya to a breathtaking positive effect. After a successful pilot trial in Kaduna and Kano, Martha Solomon, the general manager and project lead of Prexea Technology Limited, the c

item.title: Most FDA advisers say the BPC-157 peptide should be made available in the U.S. Here’s what happens next.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The FDA is deciding whether seven peptides like BPC-157 and TB-500 can be legally compounded, potentially opening the door to broader use in Americans.

item.title: You can’t hide, EFCC will probe your govt at right time – APC tackles Makinde
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Oyo State chapter of All Progressives Congress, APC has declared that Governor Seyi Makinde cannot hide from the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission, EFCC, and other anti-graft agencies. Thd party declared that the governor will be asked to account for all the monies received by his adminis

item.title: Ogun intensifies campaign against human trafficking
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: In commemoration of the 2026 World Day Against Human Trafficking, the Ogun State Government in collaboration with the International Centre for Migration Policy Development, ICMPD, has embarked on an awareness campaign to sensitise the general public about the inherent danger of human trafficking and

item.title: When will Atiku report himself to Trump?” – Presidency fires back
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "It is baffling and disappointing that someone who has sought the presidency for over three decades now resorts to reporting the President of Nigeria to US President Donald Trump and members of the US Congress," Onanuga said.

item.title: ADC Says Trump’s Letter Won’t Save Tinubu From 2027 Defeat
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has dismissed the Presidency’s presentation of a letter from United States President Donald Trump to President Bola Tinubu as an endorsement of the administration, insisting that it would not shield the President from electoral defeat in 2027

item.title: The rising cost of capital for companies today is starting to spook the stock market: ‘The worry is the spending might not pay off’
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Alphabet says it plans to throw even more money at the AI build-out. The Iran war, oil back at $100 a barrel and rising bond yields make it all the more difficult for the market to stomach.

item.title: The Treasury market is flashing a warning sign for home buyers. Are 7% mortgage rates next?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The 30-year fixed-rate mortgage edged up to its highest level of 2026.

item.title: JAMB Begins Registration For NCE, Non-Technological Agricultural Programmes
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) has commenced registration for candidates seeking admission into Nigeria Certificate in Education (NCE) programmes in Colleges of Education and non-technological agricultural programmes in polytechnics. The post JAMB Begins Registration For NCE, No

item.title: Gas Flaring: Nigeria loses $5.5bn as methane waste hits $30m daily
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Folarin Kehinde For decades, Nigeria has remained one of Africa’s largest producers of crude oil and natural gas. Yet, across oilfields in the Niger Delta, billions of cubic feet of valuable natural gas are either burned through routine flaring or lost through leaks and venting, depriving the cou

item.title: The super rich use 401(k)s and IRAs to sidestep taxes on millions of dollars. This proposed law would cut them off.

item.description: More than 200 individuals had a total of more than $85 billion in tax-sheltered retirement accounts

On February 3, 2026, the FCT minister, whil

item.title: Reps grant Human Rights Commission autonomy, prosecutorial powers
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The House of Representatives has adopted the report on a bill seeking to repeal the National Human Rights Commission Act, 2004, and the National Human Rights Commission (Amendment) Act, 2010, replacing them with the proposed National Human Rights Commission Act, 2026, aimed at strengthening the powe

item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

item.title: Geekbench 7 will push your computer or phone even harder for better benchmarking
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Primate Labs is releasing Geekbench 7, the latest generation of its popular benchmarking tool. Geekbench 7 features new video and audio encoding / decoding tests, a redesigned multi-core test, and larger, more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs to crunch through. It otherwise looks and acts just l

item.title: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Health to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot. During a briefing, Ashley Alexander, OpenAI's vice president of health product, says the company's models "are now capable of

item.title: Rangers confirm Dragojevic signing as seventh summer arrival
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Rangers have signed midfielder Vanja Dragojevic on an initial four-year deal.

item.title: Glasgow 2026: Nigeria Hunts For Glory At 20th Commonwealth Games
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: In the country's first participation at the Commonwealth Games – Auckland in 1950, it won just a single silver medal. But at the 2026 edition, Nigeria has set an ambitious target of 20 gold medals. The post Glasgow 2026: Nigeria Hunts For Glory At 20th Commonwealth Games appeared first on Channels T

item.title: Obasanjo rejects Osoba’s 2003 ‘deception’ claim, defends political strategy

item.title: Anderson declares Man City ‘kings of Manchester’ after £116 mn move
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: City confirmed Thursday the England midfielder had signed a five-year contract at the Etihad Stadium with the option of a further 12 months. The post Anderson declares Man City ‘kings of Manchester’ after £116 mn move appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Trump Threatens ‘Massive’ New Attack On Iran
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: US President, Donald Trump, has disclosed that he is seriously weighing a return to full-scale combat operations against Iran, warning that any fresh assault could dwarf the earlier campaign codenamed Operation Epic Fury. Trump made the disclosure in an interview with Axios reporter, Barak Ravid, on

item.description: The Osun State Government has ordered an immediate halt to all activities of the National Union of Road Transport Workers, NURTW, across motor parks in the state. This is as the Association of Local Governments of Nigeria, ALGON, Osun State chapter, aligned with the All Progressives Congress, APC, a

item.title: Arsenal set to make £70m bid for Newcastle's Guimaraes
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Arsenal are set to make a £70m offer for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes.

item.title: Senate Threatens Arrest Warrants For CBN, NNPCL, 40 Other MDAs Over Probe Snub
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Senate, on Thursday, escalated its confrontation with the Central Bank of Nigeria, CBN, the Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited, NNPCL, and about 40 other MDAs over failure to account for public funds, with lawmakers pushing for arrest warrants to compel compliance. The move came barely

item.title: Trump’s Letter To Tinubu, Mere Acknowledgement, Not Endorsement – APM
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Allied People’s Movement (APM) has faulted the presidency claim on President Donald Trump’s letter to his Nigerian counterpart, claiming that the letter was mere acknowledgement of President Bola Tinubu’s resolve to fight terrorism not an endorsement of his performance. APM in a stat

item.title: Why I left Nollywood to raise my children abroad — Bukky Wright
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Bukky Wright has explained why she stepped away from the Nigerian movie industry, saying she chose to focus on raising her children instead... The post Why I left Nollywood to raise my children abroad — Bukky Wright appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Heat Worries US Wheat Farmers Just as Crop Prices Are Surging
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: For farmers in North Dakota surveying their wheat as harvest closes in, scorching heat is threatening yields just as crop prices rise to a three-year high.

item.title: APC: We Know What Happened In Anambra Gov’ship Election, We Don’t Want A Repeat
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) has said it is determined to avoid a repeat of the mistakes that led to its defeat in the 2025 Anambra State governorship election, warning party stakeholders against actions capable of undermining its chances in the 2027 presidential poll. The party’s Natio

This was contained in a statement issued on Thursday by the Acting Military Information Officer, H

item.title: Honour our invitations or face sanctions, Senate warns MDAs

item.description: By Henry Umoru, Abuja The Senate on Thursday warned Ministries, Departments and Agencies (MDAs) and Government-Owned Enterprises (GOEs) against failure to honour invitations issued by the chamber or its committees, saying defaulting institutions would face sanctions. The warning followed the Senate’

item.title: Soludo’s daughter bags First Class from UK university
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Oduko, the third daughter of Anambra State Governor, Prof. Chukwuma Soludo, has graduated with a First-Class Honours degree in Neuroscience from the University of Nottingham, United Kingdom. The post Soludo’s daughter bags First Class from UK university appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Senate Approves Bills To Expand FCT High Court, Repeal NIWA Act, Tighten Tobacco Law
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Senate, on Thursday, concurred with three bills transmitted by the House of Representatives to increase the number of judges of the FCT High Court, repeal and re-enact the National Inland Waterways Authority Act, and amend Nigeria’s tobacco control law. Leading debate, Senate Leader, Opeyemi Bam

item.title: Court To Rule On NDLEA Bid To Destroy Nigerian-Mexican Drug Factory

item.description: Justice Musa Kakaki of the Federal High Court in Lagos will on July 24, rule on an application filed by the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) seeking permission to destroy a clandestine Nigerian-Mexican methamphetamine production laboratory uncovered in a remote forest in Ijebu East Local

item.title: Enugu Air Plane Skids Off Benin Runway
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: An Enugu Air aircraft operating from Lagos to Benin was involved in a runway incident at Benin Airport on Thursday after it reportedly skidded off the runway shortly after landing. The post Enugu Air Plane Skids Off Benin Runway appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: Global oil tops $100 after Houthis strike Saudi tankers and Trump threatens ‘military punishment’ on Iran
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil futures climbed sharply Thursday, with global benchmark Brent crude topping $100 a barrel for the first time since May, after Yemen’s Houthi militants claimed attacks on two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea.

item.title: Launch HN: Screenpipe (YC S26) – Power your agents by your 24/7 screen recording
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Hi Hacker News, I'm Louis. I built Screenpipe (https://screenpipe.com). Screenpipe is an app that records your screen and audio locally (only!), and gives AI agents a searchable memory of what you've seen, said, and heard. This makes it easier to automate your repetitive tasks, turn them into SOPs (

item.title: Tiwa Savage Pens Touching Message To Celebrates Son’s 11th Birthday
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Queen of Afrobeat, Tiwa Savage has taken to her social media page to celebrate her son, Jamal Balogun’s birthday as he turns 11th on Wednesday, July 22. The Grammy-award-winning singer shared photos from Jamal’s 11th birthday celebration with his friends on her Instagram page. Recounting the

item.description: The committee refrained the conferees from publishing or encouraging advertisements, congratulatory messages, or goodwill notices related to their nomination or conferment as breaches may attract sanctions.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Idris Salisu, Gusau Operatives of the Department of State Services (DSS), in collaboration with other security agencies in Zamfara State, have rescued four remaining students of the Federal Polytechnic, Kaura Namoda, who were kidnapped in June. The rescued students were reportedly released unhurt

item.description: Thousands of outraged supporters from Argentina are demanding a replay of the FIFA World Cup Final, citing what they perceive as a “corrupt” officiating performance. Argentina lost 1-0 to Spain in extra time during the tournament in New Jersey on Sunday. Ferran Torres’ goal wa

item.title: JUST IN: 68 Passengers Escape Unhurt As Enugu Air Aircraft Overshoots Runway In Benin
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: All 68 passengers aboard an Enugu Air aircraft escaped unhurt on Thursday after the plane overshot the runway while landing at Benin Airport. The aircraft, with registration number 5N-ENR, reportedly veered off the runway and came to a stop in a bushy area surrounding the airport. Airport sources sa

The agency was honoured for its work with UAC of Nigeria Plc and BIC Nigeria, with awards spanning capital markets communications, corporate reputat

item.title: Nothing New In Present Challenges PDP’s Facing – Turaki
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Chairman of the Interim National Working Committee (INWC) of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), Alhaji Kabiru Tanimu Turaki, SAN, said there is nothing new in the present challenges facing the party. Turaki at a stakeholders’ meeting in Abuja on Thursday, recalled that the PDP faced similar c

item.title: Just In: 68 Passengers Escape Death As Enugu Air Aircraft Crash-Lands In Benin
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: No fewer than 68 passengers on Thursday escaped death after an Enugu Air aircraft crash-landed at Benin Airport. It was gathered that the aircraft, with registration number 5N-ENR, had 68 passengers on board, in addition to the crew members. A source at Benin Airport, who pleaded anonymity, said the

item.title: 68 passengers cheat death as Enugu Air crash-lands in Benin
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Sixty-eight passengers narrowly escaped death when an Enugu Air aircraft crash-landed at the Benin Airport on Thursday. The post 68 passengers cheat death as Enugu Air crash-lands in Benin appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: “Instead of Tackling Persecution Against Christians, Tinubu Government Launched PR Campaign” – U.S. Senator Ted Cruz
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: United States Senator Ted Cruz has accused Nigerian officials of responding to international concerns over alleged persecution of Christians by launching a public relations campaign instead of addressing the underlying security and religious freedom issues. ‎ ‎Cruz made the remarks in a post publish

item.title: APM Faults Presidency’s Claim On Trump’s Terrorism Commendation
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Allied People’s Movement (APM) has accused the Presidency of misleading Nigerians by claiming that United States President Donald Trump commended President Bola Tinubu for his administration’s fight against terrorism.   In a statement issued on Thursday by its Nati

item.title: Breaking: Tension as Enugu Air Plane skids off Runway in Benin
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Enugu Air said the aircraft has been secured, while the relevant aviation authorities have been notified in line with established safety procedures.

item.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded Near Lows, But Micron Up; Trucker Werner Falls Below Entry (Live Coverage)
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: PDP Will Survive Crisis, Remain On 2027, Leaders Assure Members
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Leaders of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) have expressed confidence that the party will overcome its current internal challenges, remain united and field candidates at all levels in the 2027 general elections. The assurances were given at a stakeholders’ meeting on Thursday in Abuja, attended by

item.title: Sokoto Passes Out 1,550 Security Marshals Amid Rising Insecurity Concerns
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Sokoto State Government on Thursday graduated no fewer than 1,550 operatives of the Sokoto State Marshals Agency, SOSMA, in a bid to bolster the security of lives and property of the people of the state. The Ekiti State Governor, Mr. Biodun Oyebanji, was the Special Guest of Honour at the histor

item.title: Collaborate With NAFDAC To Curb Proliferation Of Fake Drugs, SGF Urges ACPN
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Secretary to the Government of the Federation, Sen. George Akume has called on the Association of Community Pharmacists of Nigeria (ACPN) to strengthen collaboration with the National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC) in tackling the proliferation of fake and substanda

item.title: Rodri to undergo back surgery and may miss start of Premier League season
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Manchester City's World Cup winner Rodri is to undergo minor surgery on his back, which means he may miss the start of the Premier League season.

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: WAFCON 2026 — Can Super Falcons Overcome Nigeria’s Imperfect Preparation To Complete Mission XI?
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Twenty-five (25) Super Falcons will arrive in Morocco with a clear objective of winning a record 11th Women’s Africa Cup of Nations title at the WAFCON 2026 that holds from 25 July to 16 August 2026, and securing qualification for the 2027 FIFA Women’s World Cup in Brazil. Justine Madug

item.title: Google 2027 Capital Spending Could Boom Near $400 Billion, Predicts JPMorgan
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Amazon puts Luna cloud-streamed games like Fallout 4 inside Prime Video
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: The new strategy that Amazon gaming exec Jeff Gattis talked to The Verge about last month is getting clearer now that Prime Video has added a new Games tab on Fire TV devices. With Prime Gaming, Amazon Game Studios, and Luna now combined into one organization, it's aiming at the more casual audience
